title: Melted Chili Russian Cheese Pizza
description: A quick, low-carb yeasty pizza that simmers in a lazy-susan-spinner, topped with spicy chili flakes and creamy cheese for a comforting sick-day treat.
instructions: In a mixing bowl combine 150g almond flour, 1 tsp baking powder, 0.5 tsp salt, and 1 tsp instant yeast.
Stir in 110ml warm water and 1 large beaten egg until a smooth dough forms.
Let the dough rest for 10 minutes to activate the yeast.
Heat a lazy-susan-spinner on medium and lightly oil its surface.
Roll out the dough into a circle that fits the spinner and place it on the heated surface.
Sprinkle 100g shredded cheddar cheese evenly over the dough.
Add 1 tsp chili flakes, 0.5 tsp smoked paprika, and drizzle 1 tbsp olive oil on top of the cheese.
Cook the pizza for 8 minutes, flipping once, until the cheese melts and edges turn golden.
